_comment: 10 reusable Digital Insurgency site/brand assets (not saucer posters). Each carries a self-contained prompt_full (bypasses the saucer STYLE wrapper). Generate: python3 art/spaceships/gen_spaceships.py --prompts art/site-assets/assets.json --outdir art/site-assets

scenes.label: Hero banner (16:9)
scenes.prompt_full: Wide cinematic 16:9 hero banner, cel-shaded cartoon vector style, retro-synthwave neon aesthetic, pure black sky. The SPACESHIP ALPHA 9 flying saucer (dark charcoal disc with hot-pink #ff1493 neon panel lines, glowing electric-cyan #00f0ff underside rim, a glass dome cockpit, a cyan 'SPACESHIP ALPHA 9' neon nameplate, a slim antenna topped by a glowing magenta orb) hovers upper-center over a neon Atlanta night skyline; a hot-pink synthwave grid horizon glows below; a teal tractor beam sweeps down over the city. Wide empty black sky at the top for a title overlay. High contrast, subtle bloom. No large text.

scenes.label: App icon / favicon (1:1)
scenes.prompt_full: A bold minimal APP ICON, 1:1 square, centered, rounded-square friendly with generous black margin. Cel-shaded neon vector emblem on pure black: the SPACESHIP ALPHA 9 saucer as a simple iconic glyph — a hot-pink #ff1493 disc silhouette with a cyan #00f0ff glass dome and a single short cyan beam beneath. Thick clean lines, extremely high contrast, reads clearly at tiny sizes. No text.

scenes.label: Credential badge card
scenes.prompt_full: A vertical cyberpunk CREDENTIAL CARD on pure black, cel-shaded neon vector style. A rounded-rectangle card with a glowing hot-pink #ff1493 neon border. Top: a small SPACESHIP ALPHA 9 saucer emblem in cyan. Big cyan #00f0ff title 'DIGITAL INSURGENCY'. Smaller pink subtitle 'FIELD COURSE'. A neon ribbon banner reading 'RANK: INSURGENT'. A blank name line placeholder near the bottom. A hexagonal cyan verification seal in one lower corner and a small square QR-code placeholder in the other. Looks like a premium verifiable digital certificate. Clean, legible, high contrast.

scenes.label: Dorian Gray — rotted (0%)
scenes.prompt_full: A single ornate framed PORTRAIT of a human face, cel-shaded neon vector style on pure black. The portrait is ROTTING and CORRUPTED: cracked canvas, glitching pixels, decayed and sickly skin, faint red digital corruption bleeding through the surface. An ornate neon frame glowing sickly pink. This is the 'Dorian Gray' portrait at its worst. Ominous, high contrast. No text.

scenes.label: Dorian Gray — healed (100%)
scenes.prompt_full: A single ornate framed PORTRAIT of the SAME human face, cel-shaded neon vector style on pure black — now fully HEALED and whole: clean luminous restored skin, the cracks closed, a calm confident expression, a gentle cyan #00f0ff glow. An ornate neon frame glowing cyan and hot-pink. This is the 'Dorian Gray' portrait fully repaired. Serene, high contrast. No text. (Companion to the rotted version — same face, same frame, same crop.)

scenes.label: GHOST guide sprite
scenes.prompt_full: GHOST the Curator as a standalone MASCOT sprite, centered full-body on pure black, cel-shaded neon vector style. A translucent human-shaped figure built of thousands of thin electric-cyan #00f0ff mesh threads, NO solid body (see-through), hovering a few inches off the ground, its face a dark void containing tiny data-visualization fragments (a scatterplot for a smile, a small histogram for a brow). Friendly but alien, calm. Usable as a floating UI companion overlay. No saucer, no text, generous black margin.

scenes.label: REAPER fail-state background (16:9)
scenes.prompt_full: A full-bleed 16:9 BACKGROUND for a failure screen, cel-shaded neon vector style. A cold RED wireframe fortress environment: dead-straight lines and 90-degree angles receding into black, red target-lock crosshairs, faint red automated error dialog boxes floating at the edges, desaturated red monochrome, scanlines. Ominous and empty through the center for overlaid UI. This is REAPER as an ENVIRONMENT, never a creature, never a face. No saucer. Minimal text.

scenes.label: Social / OG share card (1.91:1)
scenes.prompt_full: A 1.91:1 social share / OG image, cel-shaded neon vector style on pure black. LEFT: the SPACESHIP ALPHA 9 saucer (hot-pink neon disc, cyan underglow, glass dome, cyan nameplate) with a teal beam. RIGHT: a big bold cyan #00f0ff title 'DIGITAL INSURGENCY' and a hot-pink #ff1493 tagline 'Smuggle the future past the corporate immune system.' Clean, poster-like, extremely high contrast so it reads at thumbnail size.

scenes.label: Synthwave grid background (16:9)
scenes.prompt_full: A reusable wide 16:9 SECTION BACKGROUND, cel-shaded neon vector style. An endless hot-pink #ff1493 synthwave grid floor receding to a horizon under a pure-black sky, a soft electric-cyan #00f0ff glow along the horizon line, subtle scanlines and bloom. Mostly empty and dark for content overlaid on top. No saucer, no characters, no text.

scenes.label: Mirror Test emblem (1:1)
scenes.prompt_full: An emblem TILE for 'The Mirror Test', 1:1 square, centered on pure black, cel-shaded neon vector style. A single smartphone screen split down the middle: the LEFT half is a beautiful glossy green 'sunrise' gradient app UI; the RIGHT half is flipped to reveal the rotting RED exploitation-engine dashboard hidden underneath (sickly readouts, warning glyphs). A neon flip/mirror arrow curves between the two halves. Icon-like, high contrast, hot-pink and cyan accents. Minimal or no text.
